narrative:
Wooster Township has 3,048 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points.
